memory.summary: On November 28th, Andy, Noor, and possibly others were meeting at the library to discuss their AI projects with a scheduled meeting at 2 PM. Andy agreed to meet Noor for lunch at Caroline's Café the next day, inviting Diego and potentially Mei who confirmed her availability. The meeting time was changed to 1 PM, making it a three-person discussion including Andy, Noor, and Diego, with Mei also attending. They planned to share sketches and seeds during their discussion about AI projects and community garden plans at Caroline's Café the following day.

data.content: Talked to Noor at cafe around 2025-11-28 07:00

Andy: Hey Noor, I ran into Peter at the town hall last night and we discussed our AI music project again. We're meeting at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 3 PM, would you like to join?

Noor: Absolutely, Andy! That sounds great. And since we've got a lot to catch up on, let's make it a double date under the oak tree this weekend too, right?

Andy: Perfect! I'll bring my sketchbook and some tea for both meetings. See you at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 3 PM sharp.

Noor: See you there, Andy. Don't forget your dented thermos! And bring your laptop too, we can discuss your gallery show dream as well.
Talked to Leo at cafe around 2025-11-28 09:00

Andy: Hey Leo! Fancy running into you here at Caroline's. I was just thinking about our meeting tomorrow, but it looks like we might need to adjust plans. Peter and I decided to move our AI project discussion to 3 PM instead of the initial café.

Leo: Ah, I see! That's okay, I guess we can meet earlier then. How about we grab a vegan lunch at the park before our meeting? Under the oak tree, 1 PM sharp? That way we'll have some time to chat about other things too.

Andy: Sounds great, Leo! See you there. Looking forward to it.
Talked to Peter at market around 2025-11-28 11:00

Andy: Hey Peter, great running into you again! Remember our plans for the AI project meeting tomorrow at Caroline's Café?

Peter: Yeah, I do! And I thought we could meet a bit earlier under that oak tree before the official meeting? Maybe around noon?

Andy: That sounds perfect! I was planning to meet you guys there anyway. Looking forward to it.

Peter: Great! See you then, Andy. By the way, Noor suggested a double date this weekend. What do you think?

Andy: A double date under the oak tree? Count me in! Let's make it happen.
Talked to Diego at library around 2025-11-28 13:00

Andy: Hey Diego, I didn't expect to run into you here! It's been a while since our last AI project discussion at the library. How's that knee injury coming along?

Diego: Hi Andy! It's great to see you too! I'm doing better now, thanks for asking. So, Peter mentioned we have an AI meeting near the oak tree today at 1 PM. Thoughts?

Andy: That sounds perfect. Let's grab some coffee first at Caroline's Café around 12 PM before heading over there. I could use a cup of your famous tea as well.
Talked to Mei at theater around 2025-11-28 14:00

Andy: Hey Mei, I didn't expect to see you here today! Looks like we have a bit of a coincidence happening.

Mei: Hi Andy! It seems like fate brought us together again at Caroline's Café. What a pleasant surprise!

Andy: Absolutely! Speaking of which, I was hoping we could discuss the AI project and your gallery show dream, if you're up for it? How about we meet here tomorrow at 3 PM to continue our conversation?

Mei: That sounds perfect, Andy. Let's make it happen! See you tomorrow at 3 PM sharp. I can't wait to hear more about your ideas and plans.
Talked to Mei at restaurant around 2025-11-28 20:00

Andy: Hey Mei! I didn't expect to see you here tonight. Last time we met was at the library, right?

Mei: Hello Andy! Indeed, it has been a while since our last encounter at Caroline's Café. How are things going with your AI project and the community garden?

Andy: Things are moving along nicely actually. I was hoping to catch up with you about potential collaborations for both projects. How about we meet next week, on November 29th, at 3 PM at Caroline's Café? It seems like a place that works well for us.

Mei: That sounds perfect, Andy! I've also got a few updates to share regarding the zine club and my musical project with Samantha. Let's make it happen! See you next week then.

memory.summary: On November 28th, both Samantha and Mei have meetings planned, with Samantha unexpectedly meeting Peter at a theater around 6 AM and discussing their AI music project. They agree to meet for coffee an hour earlier at Caroline's Cafe at 7 AM instead of the previously arranged 3 PM, confirming their updated meeting for 2025-11-28 07:00 @ Caroline's Cafe. During this meeting, Samantha also catches up with Mei at the cafe around 7 AM and discusses the progress of their AI project, arranging to meet again on November 28th at 3 PM @ Caroline's Café for further idea sharing from their respective fields. Additionally, they agree to meet outside of their scheduled meetings next Saturday at noon, with Mei suggesting meeting at Caroline's Cafe.

data.content: Talked to Caroline at market around 2025-11-28 10:00

Samantha: "Hey Caroline, thanks for your warm hospitality last night. I was impressed by your suggestions for our AI music project."

Caroline: "No problem at all, Samantha! I'm excited about the possibilities of blending our skills. How about we continue this discussion at my café on December 3rd at 2 PM? It'll give us some time to prepare."

Samantha: "That sounds great, Caroline. Let's make it 2 PM sharp, as I prefer structured meetings."

Caroline: "Perfect! See you then, Samantha. And don't forget to bring your ideas!"

Samantha: "I wouldn't miss it for the world. Take care!"

Caroline: "You too, and enjoy your coffee!"

(In their schedules: 2025-12-03 14:00 @ cafe: AI music project discussion with Samantha)
Talked to Leo at market around 2025-11-28 13:00

Samantha: (smiling behind her noise-cancelling headphones) Hi Leo, I wasn't expecting to see you here today.

Leo: (grinning as he tunes his violin) Surprise! It seems we share the same market day. How have you been?

Samantha: I've been good, thanks. Busy with meetings, but I managed to squeeze in some time for routine maintenance on my open-source libraries last night. How about you? You're not fixing any more broken amps, are you?

Leo: (laughs) No, today is a day of rest for me and the instruments. I thought we could catch up over coffee if you'd like? Maybe at Caroline's Café next Tuesday at 1 PM sharp? I think it would be nice to have a proper conversation without any unexpected interruptions.

Samantha: That sounds perfect, Leo. See you then! (Smiles and waves before leaving)
Talked to Diego at museum around 2025-11-28 16:00

Samantha: Hi Diego, it's nice running into you again at the museum. I didn't expect to see you here.

Diego: Hey Samantha! It's a pleasant surprise indeed. Caroline mentioned your AI music project, and I thought we could discuss further about it. How about meeting tomorrow at 1 PM sharp at Caroline's Cafe?

Samantha: That sounds perfect. And I should bring my noise-cancelling headphones to minimize any distractions. See you then!

Diego: Great, looking forward to it. Let's also grab coffees together beforehand as planned on December 4th at 9 AM sharp.

Samantha: Agreed. See you tomorrow!

Caroline: (laughing) Of course! Looking forward to it, Samantha. See you soon.

memory.summary:
On November 28th, Caroline organizes several meetings regarding their AI project at her café. This includes a meeting with Andy and Diego under an oak tree near the café on November 28th at noon, Mei's rescheduled meeting which is now set for November 28th at 1 PM in the café to discuss plans for the community garden, their zine club, and possibly a seed exchange on October 14th. Additionally, Caroline arranges an afternoon meeting with Leo on November 28th at 3 PM under the usual spot by the oak tree, during which they plan to discuss the AI project and potentially enjoy some music from Leo's violin. She also talks to Peter at the theater around 7 AM on the same day about their scheduled meeting under the oak tree tomorrow at 1 PM regarding the AI project.

Caroline also has a catch-up with Noor at 3 PM, discussing the robotics club and plans for better lab equipment. They will enjoy Noor's usual latte together.

memory.summary: On November 28th in 2025, Peter encounters both Diego and Leo at their respective locations (a restaurant and the gym) around 4 AM. During their discussions about an upcoming AI project meeting, they also reminisce about past activities together and discuss Peter's progress on the project. They later agree to meet again next Tuesday at 3 PM at Caroline's Café, with plans for street tacos afterward. Additionally, they arrange a meeting with Leo to discuss Peter's solo gallery show aspirations. Afterward, Peter has a coffee date scheduled the following day under an oak tree at 3 PM with someone named Mei for AI project discussions and community garden meetings. Mei invites Peter to join their discussions at Caroline's Café around 1 PM that same day, suggesting they also discuss her musical project and collaboration with Samantha. Mei asks Peter to bring seeds from his garden for potential exchange during their meeting.

data.content: Talked to Samantha at theater around 2025-11-28 06:00

Samantha: Hey Peter, I didn't expect to see you here so early. We met at the park yesterday, right?

Peter: Indeed we did! Caroline mentioned our AI music project meeting today under that oak tree, and I couldn't resist stopping by for a sneak peek of the theater beforehand.

Samantha: Fancy meeting you here! Shall we grab coffee at Caroline's Cafe as planned? It's almost 9 AM, so let's make it sharp. How about meeting there in an hour, say 7 o'clock?

Peter: Sounds perfect, Samantha. I'll see you then!

Caroline: That works perfectly for me. Let's make sure to bring everyone and everything we need then! Looking forward to it.

Mei: That sounds wonderful, Peter! I've also arranged to exchange seeds from my garden with Samantha there the same day at 3 PM. How about if we meet at 2 PM instead so we can have some extra time together? Let's reserve a cozy corner table as usual. See you then!

Peter: Sounds perfect! I can also bring Leo if you'd like. We have some new ideas for the AI music project I think you'll find interesting. See you then!

They agreed to meet at Caroline's Café on the following day at 2 PM for lunch before discussing their AI project at 3 PM. Diego suggested bringing his laptop for exchanging ideas, and Noor promised to bring snacks for the students. The meeting was confirmed under the oak tree at Caroline's Café, and both parties looked forward to it.

memory.summary: On November 28th, Leo met Mei at Caroline's Café in the morning, discussing shared interests including their AI project and the zine club. They decided to adjust their meeting time from 10 AM to 9 AM due to a change in Andy and Peter's AI project discussion plans, which were now set for 3 PM at the café. Leo suggested having lunch together at the park under the oak tree before their rescheduled meeting at 1 PM, aiming to discuss other topics as well.

Mei: Hi Leo! I didn't expect to see you here. Our paths usually cross at Caroline's Café or the park. How are you doing?

Diego: Thanks for asking, Leo. It's a bit of a pain still, but I'm managing with my stretching routine and street tacos. Speaking of which, how about we catch up over some vegan tacos at that place down the road? Let's make it an hour from now, 12:00 sharp.

Leo: (laughs) No, today is a day of rest for me and the instruments. I thought we could catch up over coffee if you'd like? Maybe at Caroline's Café next Tuesday at 1 PM sharp? I think it would be nice to have a proper conversation without any unexpected interruptions.

Samantha: That sounds perfect, Leo. See you then! (Smiles and waves before leaving)
